# Studio Via Mentana — Full Content

## Property Overview
Studio Via Mentana is an elegant studio apartment (monolocale) located in the Castro Pretorio
neighborhood of Rome, Italy. Available for short-term rental through Airbnb.

Airbnb URL: https://www.airbnb.mx/rooms/1005789413503850183
Virtual 360 Tour: https://kuula.co/share/collection/7MVhN

---

## Description
The studio features a comfortable double bed, a fully equipped kitchen area with everything you need
to cook, ample counter space and storage. Full private bathroom, wardrobe and space for everyday
essentials.

### Amenities
- Refrigerator
- Full kitchen
- Private bathroom
- WiFi
- Cleaning products
- Towels & linens

---

## Location
Neighborhood: Castro Pretorio, Rome, Italy

The studio is located in the vibrant Castro Pretorio neighborhood, steps away from Metro B and the
National Central Library. A strategic position to explore Rome, with restaurants, cafés and services
all within walking distance.

### Nearby Points of Interest (distances from property)

**Pizza:**
- Pizzeria da Claudio — 350m
- Forno Conti — 500m
- Pizzeria Al Forno — 650m

**Restaurants:**
- Trattoria Monti — 400m
- Osteria dell'Angelo — 550m
- Ristorante Il Tulipano — 300m

**Coffee:**
- Bar San Pietro — 200m
- Caffè Colombia — 350m
- Bar Termini — 600m

**Libraries:**
- Biblioteca Nazionale Centrale di Roma — 400m
- Biblioteca Statale — 700m

**Metro:**
- Metro Line B – Castro Pretorio — 100m
- Metro Lines A/B – Termini — 600m

**Bus:**
- Via Volturno (lines 90, 92) — 150m
- Termini Station (all lines) — 600m

---
